 Citi does business in more than 180 countries and jurisdictions, providing corporations, governments, investors, institutions and individuals with a broad range of financial p
reasoning: The evidence confirms Citigroup has a presence in more than 180 countries and an on-the-ground presence in more than 90 markets, which is broadly consistent with the claim of 'almost 100 countries' for local banking out of 180 total.
